zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie於1372年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie24歲，母親Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee18歲。他於大約1391年與Mariotta Glen在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年5月14日在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie于1372年1月1日出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie24岁，母亲Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee18岁。他于大约1391年与Mariotta Glen在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1429年5月14日在英国苏格兰費伏享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: Boswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

variants.name: Buswell
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

variants.name: Biswell
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): possibly from a lost or unidentified place called with Old English bēos ‘coarse grass’ + wella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, a variant of Boswell .

variants.name: Bussell
meanings: English: variant of   Boswell   (of Norman origin) or   Bissell   1.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie was born on 1 January 1372, in Fife, Scotland, his father, John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie, was 24 and his mother, Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee, was 18. He married Mariotta Glen about 1391, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 May 1429, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie est né le 1 janvier 1372, à Fife, Écosse, son père, John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mariotta Glen environ 1391, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1429, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie am 1. Januar 1372 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie 24 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee 18. Er hat um 1391 in Schottland, United Kingdom Mariotta Glen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Mai 1429 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie è nato il il 1 gennaio 1372 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mariotta Glen circa 1391, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1429, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregieが1372年1月1日にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregieは24歳，母Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbeeは18歳であった。約1391年にイギリススコットランドでMariotta Glenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年5月14日にイギリススコットランドフィフで57歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie(이)가 1372년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1391년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mariotta Glen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 5월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프에 묻혔다.

mn.1 January 1372–14 May 1429: 1372 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 1–1429 оны Тавдугаар сарын 14

pt.1 January 1372–14 May 1429: 1 de janeiro de 1372–14 de maio de 1429
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1372, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariotta Glen aproximadamente 1391, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1429, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie родился 1 января 1372 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariotta Glen около 1391 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 мая 1429 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности фиф, Шотландия.

es.1 January 1372–14 May 1429: 1 de enero de 1372–14 de mayo de 1429
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie nació el 1 de enero de 1372, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, John De Boswell - Second Lord of Balgregie, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Melville of Cairnbee, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mariotta Glen aproximadamente 1391, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1429, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Fife, Scotland.
